---
title: "SelectionPanelShell.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SelectionPanelShell.tsx"
loc: 42
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.92
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.90
overall_score: 4.55
---

## Intent
The `SelectionPanelShell.tsx` module implements the aesthetic frame and layout for the file details view. It provides the high-tech 'Glass' styling, title bars, and action controls, serving as the primary interface for exploring a file's lore, metrics, and dependency trajectories.

## Interaction Protocol
Use this component as the main wrapper for file-specific information in the 3D view. It receives the selected node data and coordinates the display of intents, protocols, and metrics within a cohesive visual structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [SelectionPanel](file://./SelectionPanel.tsx)
- [TrajectoryList](file://./TrajectoryList.tsx)
- [SectorMetrics](file://./SectorMetrics.tsx)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SelectionPanelShell`
- `SelectionPanelShell`
- `filename`
